rows.notes: P61 starts only after P60 lands.
The hygiene snapshot should classify either the published clean descendant or the registered successor execution branch.
The current published clean descendant should be clean enough for outward sync if other gates are green.
Rebaselined hygiene expects green release-preflight and archive-ready summaries on the same branch.
The current stage driver should expose P61 and the rebaselined clean release posture.
